queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default focusing on how the magnitude of requested credit amounts contributes to increased credit risk and default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of credit risk drivers examining how the absence of a checking account functions as a mitigating factor that decreases the likelihood of borrower default.
Empirical analysis of the determinants of default assessing how extended loan durations in months act as a primary credit risk driver that increases the probability of credit default.
